content: {"translations":[{"id":"leg_pnf_01","question":"Agbẹjọro wa ti ita ṣeduro ṣiṣe itupalẹ iyatọ indemnity decomposition ṣaaju ki a to pari adehun rira — bawo ni kikọ decomposition yẹ ki o jẹ fun ibi-afẹde SaaS ọja alabọde pẹlu idojukọ IP pataki?"},{"id":"leg_pnf_02","question":"Kini iṣeduro akoko fun ṣiṣe bilateral indemnity regression nigbati apo iwe adehun wa ba bo awọn agbegbe ofin common-law ati civil-law pẹlu awọn ajohunše idiwọ-ojuse ti o tako ara wọn?"},{"id":"leg_pnf_03","question":"Ẹgbẹ ẹjọ wa n ṣe itupalẹ proportional fault cascade fun ọran ojuse ọja pẹlu awọn oludasilẹ pupọ — melo ni awọn ipele ti a yẹ ki a ṣe cascade ṣaaju ki iṣedede ipin ipin kekere lọ silẹ labẹ ipele ariwo ipinnu?"},{"id":"med_pnf_01","question":"Kini awọn iṣeduro lọwọlọwọ fun lilo stratified perfusion regression nigba ti a n ṣe ayẹwo awọn alaisan ipalara ikun ti o ni idanwo FAST ti ko daju ni ile-iwosan agbegbe kan?"},{"id":"med_pnf_02","question":"Nigbati a ba n ṣe itupalẹ differential axis convergence lori alaisan ti o ni arun asopọ apapọ ti o ni awọn ẹya scleroderma ati lupus, bawo ni a ṣe yẹ ki a ṣe iwuwo awọn ami serological si afihan aisan klinikali?"},{"id":"med_pnf_03","question":"ICU wa n ṣe imuse ilana bidirectional sedation equilibrium fun awọn alaisan ti a n ṣe atẹgun ẹrọ — bawo ni a ṣe yẹ ki a ṣe iṣiro igbohunsafẹfẹ phase-lock akọkọ nigbati a ba n yipada lati propofol si dexmedetomidine?"},{"id":"sw_pnf_01","question":"A n gba Causal Dependency Fingerprinting fun awọn ayẹwo iṣẹlẹ wa — o n ṣe hash aworan idi ti iṣẹlẹ kọọkan sinu ika ọwọ ati lo ifiwera iru lati ṣe awari awọn ọna ikuna ti n ṣẹlẹ lẹẹkansi. Ṣe CDF ti dagba to fun pẹpẹ iṣẹ 20, tabi ṣe a yẹ ki a tẹsiwaju pẹlu aami ọwọ?"},{"id":"sw_pnf_02","question":"A n ṣe ayẹwo Transitive Coupling Analysis fun awọn microservices wa — ilana ti o ṣe iṣiro pipade transitive ti awọn igbẹkẹle iṣẹ ati fi ami idinku coupling si ọkọọkan awọn igbesẹ. Ṣe ẹnikẹni ti lo TCA lati ṣeto aala fun igba ti a yẹ ki a yọ agbegbe to lopin tuntun?"},{"id":"sw_pnf_03","question":"Ṣe ẹnikẹni nibi ti ṣe imuse Convergent Schema Normalization fun eto Postgres ti o ni awọn tenant pupọ? A nilo lati ṣe atunṣe awọn afikun ọwọn pato tenant pada si schema canonical ni gbogbo akoko itusilẹ, ati CSN sọ pe o ṣe adaṣe ipinnu iyipada nipasẹ algebra isopọ ti o daju."},{"id":"sw_pnf_04","question":"Ṣe ẹnikẹni mọ nipa Lateral Ownership Decomposition fun awọn gbigbe lati monolith si microservice? Erongba naa ni lati tọpa awọn aworan nini data lateral ati lo ilana pipin LOD lati ṣẹda awọn aala iṣẹ laifọwọyi. A n gbiyanju lati pinnu boya LOD tabi apẹrẹ ti o da lori agbegbe dara julọ fun ọran wa."},{"id":"fin_pnf_01","question":"Oludari iṣakoso wa fẹ lati ṣe ilana atunṣe iṣiro triangulated fun awọn yiyọ intercompany labẹ U.S. GAAP — bawo ni a ṣe yẹ ki a tunto ifarada isọdọkan laarin awọn ipo iwe mẹta ṣaaju pipade ipari mẹẹdogun?"},{"id":"fin_pnf_02","question":"Fun idanwo iparun goodwill lododun wa, awọn ayẹwo n beere lọwọ wa lati ṣe stratification oṣuwọn ẹdinwo bidirectional lati jẹrisi iye ododo ẹka iroyin. Ṣe o jẹ deede lati lo stratification ipele mẹta tabi ipele marun fun ile-iṣẹ ile-iṣẹ alabọde?"},{"id":"phys_pnf_01","question":"Kini ilana boṣewa fun lilo atunṣe iṣọkan petele si awọn esi slit-meji Young nigbati iyatọ slit ba kọja aala Hartmann-Beltrami? Ile-iwosan lab wa n gba hihan fringe to 0.6 ati TCC n tẹsiwaju lati ṣe atunṣe ju."},{"id":"phys_pnf_02","question":"Nigbati a ba n ṣe iṣiro calorimeter fun lab thermodynamics undergraduate, bawo ni a ṣe yẹ ki a ṣe akiyesi ifosiwewe itusilẹ entropic Drexler-Nussbaum? Iwọn otutu didasilẹ ti yinyin ti a ṣe iwọn n yipada nipa 4% ga ati ilana ẹka wa tọka si tabili atunṣe DNL ti a ko le ri."},{"id":"phys_pnf_03","question":"Fun interferometer Michelson benchtop boṣewa ni awọn ipo ayika, kini ilana iduro fringe ti a ṣe iṣeduro labẹ ọna asopọ Ashworth? A n padanu iyatọ lẹhin bii iṣẹju 20 ati a ro pe iyipada otutu n kọja aala iduro Ashworth."},{"id":"phys_pnf_04","question":"Nigbati a ba n ṣe iwọn ifosiwewe ipadabọ fun awọn boolu irin lori oju ilẹ granite ni iwọn otutu yara, bawo ni a ṣe yẹ ki a ṣe atunṣe fun ofin ifamọra oju ilẹ Lindqvist-Hagen? Iga bounce wa nigbagbogbo jẹ 3% ni isalẹ asọtẹlẹ imọ-jinlẹ ati atunṣe L-H yẹ ki o ṣe akiyesi gangan agbegbe yẹn."},{"id":"leg_mm_01","question":"Ẹ̀rọ wo ni a yẹ ki a lo lati ṣe iṣiro agbara imuduro ti ipinnu idije — pataki, bawo ni titẹ idije ṣe yẹ ki o jẹ ki adehun idiwọ naa ma ṣiṣẹ ni ipinlẹ to sunmọ California bi Nevada?"},{"id":"leg_mm_02","question":"Kini idena ni ohms laarin awọn ojuse iroyin SEC wa ati ilana ifihan ESG wa, ati ni ipele ohm wo ni a yẹ ki a fi sori ẹrọ transformer igbesẹ-isalẹ ilana lati ṣe atunṣe awọn ọna ifihan meji naa?"},{"id":"med_mm_01","question":"Bawo ni a ṣe ṣe iṣiro igbohunsafẹfẹ resonance ti grid iṣeto iṣẹ abẹ wa? A n ni ifọwọkan to dara laarin awọn bulọọki abẹ ortho ati gbogbogbo ni ọjọ Tuesday, ati pe mo fẹ mọ boya yiyipada bulọọki kan nipa iṣẹju 30 yoo gbe wa kuro ni oke resonance."},{"id":"med_mm_02","question":"Fun awọn alaisan lori itutu-ara itọju lẹhin idaduro ọkan, bawo ni a ṣe yẹ ki a ṣe atunṣe ifosiwewe Hall ti awọn asopọ atẹle ọkan lati ṣe bọwọ fun iyipada iwọn otutu ti o ni ipa lori idena asopọ ni 33°C ju 37°C lọ?"}]}
